ddls:
CREATE TABLE "supplies" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply record */,
  "supply_type" TEXT /* Type of supply (e.g., Outward taxable, zero-rated, nil-rated, etc.) */,
  "total_taxable_value" REAL /* Total taxable value of the supply */,
  "integrated_tax" REAL /* Integrated tax applicable to the supply */,
  "central_tax" REAL /* Central tax applicable to the supply */,
  "state_tax" REAL /* State tax applicable to the supply */,
  "cess" REAL /* Cess applicable to the supply */,
  "supply_date" TEXT /* Date of the supply */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for the supply */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the supply */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer of the supply */,
  "supply_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the supply */,
  "is_zero_rated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the supply is zero-rated */,
  "is_nil_rated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the supply is nil-rated */,
  "is_exempted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the supply is exempted */,
  "reverse_charge" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the supply is liable to reverse charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplies_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplies_supply_type FOREIGN KEY ("supply_type") REFERENCES supply_types ("supply_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplies_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_categories" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax category */,
  "tax_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax category (e.g., Integrated tax, Central tax) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tax category is active */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the tax category is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax category */,
  "supply_type" TEXT /* Type of supply to which the rate applies */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Rate value as a percentage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the tax rate is effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date until which the tax rate is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_tax_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_id") REFERENCES tax_categories ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_types" (
  "supply_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of supply */,
  "supply_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the supply type (e.g., Outward, Inward) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the supply type is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the supply type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cess_rates" (
  "cess_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cess */,
  "cess_name" TEXT /* Name of the cess (e.g., cess on luxury goods) */,
  "cess_rate" REAL /* Rate of the cess as a percentage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the cess rate is effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date until which the cess rate is valid */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the cess rate is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cess_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inward_supplies" (
  "inward_supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inward supply record */,
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supply record that is inward */,
  "reverse_charge_tax" REAL /* Tax applicable to the inward supply liable to reverse charge */,
  "supplier_details" TEXT /* Details of the supplier for the inward supply */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for the inward supply */,
  "supply_date" TEXT /* Date of the inward supply */,
  "is_reverse_charge" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the supply is liable to reverse charge */,
  "supply_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the inward supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inward_supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inward_supplies_supply_id FOREIGN KEY ("supply_id") REFERENCES supplies ("supply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for authentication */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, tax officer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supply record that was affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax return */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who filed the return */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the tax return was filed */,
  "total_tax" REAL /* Total tax amount declared in the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tax return (e.g., filed, pending) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the tax return */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tax has been paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_returns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_tax_rates" (
  "state_tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state tax rate record */,
  "supply_type" TEXT /* Type of supply to which the state tax applies */,
  "state_tax_rate" REAL /* Rate of the state tax as a percentage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the state tax rate is effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date until which the state tax rate is valid */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the state tax rate is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., routine, special) */,
  "audit_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the audit */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_audits_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("conducted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being checked for compliance */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is compliant or not */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the compliance check */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_compliance_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("conducted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_compliance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit report */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit related to the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the audit report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the audit */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the report is confidential */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the audit report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_reports_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES tax_audits ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_reports_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("conducted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
